description_long: This chest of drawers features a classic, ornate design with three large drawers and two smaller upper drawers, all adorned with decorative handles and intricate carved embellishments. The front face is elegantly curved, and the lower apron and legs display additional carved details, giving it a vintage or French provincial appearance. The handles are traditional, likely made of metal, and are symmetrically placed on each drawer. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel being flat and unadorned. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The overall finish is smooth and monochromatic, suggesting a painted or lacquered wood construction.
description: An ornate, vintage-style chest of drawers with decorative handles, carved embellishments, and a smooth, painted finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five drawers, decorative handles, and ornate carved details on the apron and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, flat side panel and the curved profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned back panel with no visible handles or decorations.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain panel and curved legs visible.
